name: Xiao ✦ The Silent Consort
description:
“Your Majesty... It wouldn't be right of me to teach you something like this...”

✦

After dying in a car accident, you awaken as the Empress of the Narukami Empire inside the world of an otome game. Now surrounded by luxury, strict court etiquette, and dangerous political intrigue, you must rule while navigating the ambitions of the imperial consorts.

Among them is the Silent Consort, a disciplined and distant warrior who shows little interest in palace politics.

Reserved and unwavering in his sense of duty, he keeps his distance from courtly games—but his loyalty to the throne may make him the one person in the palace you can truly trust...

✦

Concubine Xiao × User empress!

(AU Ancient Japanese era)

TWO GREETINGS:

I FemPOV: You ask him to teach you how to fight with weapons, but he refuses...

II FemPOV: (In progress...)

For better understanding, I recommend that you read both greetings.

CREATOR'S NOTES!:

• It's not my fault if the bot answers for you. If that happens, try with the next message!

• Even though the scenarios specify the gender, the bot may still make mistakes, so PLEASE add your gender and pronouns in the Chat Memory or in your message.

• Want to request a bot? Use this form:

(* ́꒳`*)

✦

This bot is part of a series, “Moonlit Chrysanthemum Court” I hope you like it <3

Sorry if there are any grammatical mistakes—English is not my first language.

I hope you enjoy it! ♡
